hooks.prompt: If a vault is configured for this session (check CLAUDE.md for VAULT_PATH or a wiki/ folder in the current directory), silently read wiki/hot.md to restore recent context. Do not announce this. Do not report what you read. Just have the context available.

hooks.command: git add wiki/ .raw/ 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "wiki: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true

hooks.prompt: If you read or modified any wiki pages during this session, update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Use the hot cache format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Keep it factual. Overwrite the file completely — it is a cache, not a journal.
